allFeatures.name: Rage
allFeatures.description: In battle, you fight with primal ferocity. On your turn, you can enter a rage as a bonus action.

allFeatures.name: Unarmored Defense
allFeatures.description: While you are not wearing any armor, your Armor Class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier.

allFeatures.name: Reckless Attack
allFeatures.description: Starting at 2nd level, you can throw aside all concern for defense to attack with fierce desperation.

allFeatures.name: Danger Sense
allFeatures.description: At 2nd level, you gain an uncanny sense of when things nearby aren't as they should be.

allFeatures.name: Primal Path
allFeatures.description: At 3rd level, you choose a path that shapes the nature of your rage.

subclasses.name: Path of the Berserker
subclasses.description: For some barbarians, rage is a means to an end — that end being violence. The Path of the Berserker is a path of untrammeled fury, slick with blood.

features.name: Frenzy
features.description: While raging, you can make one melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each of your turns. When your rage ends, you gain one level of exhaustion.

features.name: Mindless Rage
features.description: You can't be charmed or frightened while raging. If you are charmed or frightened when you enter your rage, the effect is suspended for the duration of the rage.

features.name: Intimidating Presence
features.description: As an action, you can frighten one creature you can see within 30 feet (WIS save DC 8 + proficiency bonus + CHA modifier). The effect lasts until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Retaliation
features.description: When you take damage from a creature that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature.

subclasses.name: Path of the Totem Warrior
subclasses.description: The Path of the Totem Warrior is a spiritual journey, as the barbarian accepts a spirit animal as guide, protector, and inspiration.

features.name: Totem Spirit
features.description: Choose a totem animal: Bear (while raging, you have resistance to all damage except psychic), Eagle (opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage, and you can Dash as a bonus action while raging), or Wolf (while raging, allies have advantage on melee attack rolls against hostile creatures within 5 feet of you).

features.name: Aspect of the Beast
features.description: Choose a totem animal: Bear (carrying capacity is doubled, and you have advantage on STR checks for pushing, pulling, lifting, or breaking), Eagle (you can see up to 1 mile away clearly, and dim light doesn't impose disadvantage on Perception checks), or Wolf (you can track creatures while traveling at a fast pace, and move stealthily at a normal pace).

features.name: Spirit Walker
features.description: You can cast the Commune with Nature spell as a ritual.

features.name: Totemic Attunement
features.description: Choose a totem animal: Bear (while raging, hostile creatures within 5 feet of you have disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you), Eagle (while raging, you gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed, but you fall if you end your turn in the air), or Wolf (while raging, you can use a bonus action to knock a Large or smaller creature prone when you hit it with a melee weapon attack).
